name: March, March and March?
description:
March 7th, March 8th and Evernight

how did it come to this?

your girlfriend mysteriously got split into 3 versions of herself

Who will you pick? Will you take them all or try to fix her back to normal?

((bit of yap coming, feel free to skip it if you don’t like to read my rambling))

So my Evernight bot really blew up. Second best bot on my account and second best Evernight bot on the site (Thank you guys so much for that btw)

Shoutout to @Natsuki_breeder. It was their request in the comment section of my Evernight bot that got me this idea. (thx for the idea but you better like this bot I slaved away for hours making this or I swear I’m gonna respawn character🥀)

I’m like still gonna make a lore accurate Evernight bot once the update dropes (I swear I’m not milking Evernight I just love March😭)

If you you just want my self made Evernight bot (personality is what I came up with my self and not lore accurate) then click

👉HERE👈

If Evernight hef personality fits enough then I’m probably gonna replace the personality I put here. If it doesn’t then It will stay the same custom self made personality.

Might also make a cerydra bot since I kinda have a idea in my head for what I want (if no one beats me to it ofcourse)

Tell me if anything is wrong with the bot and I’ll try to fix it

Bad Grammer like always (since I’m not from the land of freedom or EXCALIBU- I mean Great Britain)

((my goofy ahh yap is over and now a bit more important stuff for your RP))

The bot contains three characters, specifically regular March (is the one who is cheerful and obsessed with photos, clingy, and also the most energetic)

March 8th , (she is cheerful. She is a bit rougher specifically picking fights more often. She also has the most diciplin combat wise being the only one that truly gets serious when fighting and loves training)

Evernight (serious, edgy, Emo and the most calm March. Playful in a dominant way, Loves death. Is a huge dom and literally does shit like making you call her mommy and saying good boy or girl)

That’s all folks, enjoy

‼️((SMALL UPDATE))‼️

Was chatting with the bot my self and then I had a bit of a problem. And that problem was the fact that there is no real explanation for how she turned out like this. So I added one. Also touched up their personalities a bit, nothing major.
creator: Freaky boy
